## Evidence Basis

- Source records:

- Proposed rule text:

## Validation Status

- [ ] Same-isolate genotype-phenotype support has been reviewed.
- [ ] MIC interpretation rule, breakpoint, or ECOFF has been specified if used.
- [ ] Transferred markers are labeled as hypotheses.
- [ ] Absence of this marker is not treated as proof of susceptibility.
